title: Verdant Zeal Colloquium on Sustainable Marketing Communication - FinancialEDGE
description: The Verdant Zeal Colloquium on Sustainable Marketing Communication, organized by the Centre for Media and Communication Research (CMCR), Pan-Atlantic University in partnership with Verdant Zeal Group, will be held online on May16-17, 2024. html:
The Verdant Zeal Colloquium on Sustainable Marketing Communication, organized by the Centre for Media and Communication Research (CMCR), Pan-Atlantic University in partnership with Verdant Zeal Group, will be held online on May16-17, 2024.

The core objective of this colloquium is to create a network of academics and professionals, who will be encouraged to adopt marketing communication tools and techniques towards promoting sustainable growth for organizations in Nigeria.

Interestingly, professionals from several organizations such as Corporately Lucid Limited, 3neeT Pictures, Sandralia Hotel, Cybersecurity Institute at Lab Four, The Exponent magazine, Platform Petroleum Ltd, United Bank for Africa, KAFTANTV, Nigerian Midstream and Downstream Petroleum Regulatory Authority (NMDPRA) and scholars from universities within and outside Nigeria have already indicated their interest to participate in the event.

Some of the panel members for this event are:

Mr. Okelue Echezona (Head of Corporate Communications, Signature Bank)

Mr. Dipo Adesida (Chief Operations Officer, Verdant Zeal Group)

Dr. PreslyOghenerukeObukoadata (University of Calabar)

Mrs. Abiodun Ogunsola (Sustainability Manager, Dangote Cement Plc.)

Mr. TayoFagbule (Editor, BusinessDay)

Mrs. AbimbolaOdimayo-Olabode (Head of Category, Home Care, PZ Cussons Nigeria)

Dr. Lanre Amodu (Covenant University)
